text:
2012 and 2013 files only. 

The CCW Pharmacy ID is created by linking the service provider identification number 
(SRVC_PRVDR_ID) from the source PDE to the proprietary National Council for Prescription Drug 
Programs (NCPDP) Database. The variable is populated only for the subset of CCW Pharmacy IDs 
where the physical location of the pharmacy did not change, but the NCPDP pharmacy data for that 
year indicated the ownership changed.
